recommendation_scope: select candidate C as the reference architecture for human review only
primary_question: What is the smallest dynamical substrate in which an interventionally addressable boundary can emerge without hard-coding memory ownership or individual identity?

formal_definition.name: interventional_individuality_at_declared_scale
necessary_not_sufficient_properties: longitudinal persistence under a tracker-independent instantaneous entity definition
localized addressability through a pre-existing causal edge
complete conservation and boundary-work accounting for the declared channels
full-rank support for every declared factorial estimand
entity definition and physics independent of tracker output and diagnostic IDs
formal_definition.falsification_rule: failure of any necessary property blocks the causally addressable individual claim; passing all properties permits only the declared intervention-scale claim

ontology.definition: an ID-independent spatial or dynamical descriptor remains similar through time
an instantaneous connected or bounded collection of matter
an instantaneous material component with a physical boundary and auditable internal, crossing, source, sink and response channels
an operational entity satisfying every necessary interventional-individuality property for a declared response, scale and horizon
a set-valued parent-descendant process with formation of new operational entities and prospective inheritance evidence

constraints_from_current_no_go: every physical face update is a named sum of oriented edge fluxes with explicit endpoint parents
no global normalization may combine local and common channels
no state or collar clamp may be interpreted as environmental unavailability
every active boundary intervention must update the two endpoints with equal-and-opposite flux contributions and log controller work
no reporter may be added specifically to expose a future history field
no ownership variable, genome, permanent entity ID, inside bit, component target or tracker feedback may enter physics
no intervention support may follow an entity after onset; supports and face sets are frozen from the common pre-intervention state
no old threshold, seed, effect, survival rate or confirmation status transfers

A_phase_field_droplets.boundary: emergent diffuse interface from local phase separation; semipermeability is a constitutive function of the interface
A_phase_field_droplets.edge_modularity: medium; chemical-potential and high-order stencil parents complicate unique face attribution
A_phase_field_droplets.factorial_surgery: possible only after a finite-volume edge decomposition and fixed-face support proof
A_phase_field_droplets.manufacture_risk: medium-high; the order parameter can become an imposed inside/outside oracle and interface mobility cuts can manufacture a compartment
A_phase_field_droplets.cost: O(number_of_cells) explicit or O(number_of_cells log number_of_cells) with an implicit or spectral solve
A_phase_field_droplets.LawSpec_compatibility: low direct compatibility; high compatibility with the frozen dataclass/serialization pattern

B_particle_contact_aggregates.boundary: contact-graph cut of an emergent aggregate; no independent physical membrane variable
B_particle_contact_aggregates.edge_modularity: high for pairwise antisymmetric contact fluxes
B_particle_contact_aggregates.factorial_surgery: algebraically clean, but maintaining member-local support risks using particle IDs or tracker feedback
B_particle_contact_aggregates.manufacture_risk: medium-high; a detector-defined graph cut can be mistaken for a physical boundary and re-import occupancy alias
B_particle_contact_aggregates.cost: O(N squared) on the current reference path or O(N times mean_degree) with a new neighbour list
B_particle_contact_aggregates.LawSpec_compatibility: highest; existing LawSpec mechanics can be composed with a new conservative exchange spec

C_lattice_emergent_bonds.boundary: a closed cut-set may emerge from a bond variable governed uniformly on every lattice face; closure is neither targeted nor rewarded
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.turnover_split_merge: possible when permeability stays nonzero and bonds form and break
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.edge_modularity: high; matter and resource updates are sums of named antisymmetric face fluxes
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.factorial_surgery: fixed t0 face and cell sets permit existing-edge local and environmental gates without tracker or diagnostic IDs
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.manufacture_risk: medium and directly falsifiable by no-boundary, open-sheet, percolation, dissolution, leakage, split and merge regimes
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.cost: O(number_of_cells plus number_of_faces) with a scalar reference path of the same order
C_lattice_emergent_bonds.LawSpec_compatibility: medium-high at the framework level through a new frozen serializable LatticeBondLawSpec; the particle-specific LawSpec remains unchanged

minimal_dynamic_state_before_history: m_x nonnegative mobile matter on cells
n_x nonnegative ordinary environmental resource on cells
b_xy in [0,1] physical structural bond state on every undirected nearest-neighbour face; b is not history and cannot be the L factor
diagnostics_not_in_physics: diagnostic matter IDs if ever used

equations.local_affinity: A_x = theta_m * sum_y w_xy m_y + theta_n * n_x
equations.resource_flux: J_n[xy] = D_n * p_n(b_xy) * (n_x-n_y) = -J_n[yx], with p_n in [0,1]
equations.resource_update: n_x_tilde = n_x - dt*sum_y J_n[xy] + dt*(S_n[x]-D_n_local[x]-R_native[m_x,n_x]); n_x_next = n_x_tilde - (epsilon_b/2)*sum_incident_e positive(delta_b_e)
equations.bond_cue: Psi_xy is a nonnegative symmetric function only of endpoint and fixed-neighbour state; it contains no component, closure, inside or tracker term
equations.bond_update: r_on=k_on*Psi_xy; r_off=k_off+k_tension*T_xy; b_eq=r_on/(r_on+r_off); b_xy_next=b_eq+(b_xy-b_eq)*exp(-(r_on+r_off)*dt), with b unchanged when both rates are zero
equations.bond_fuel: for delta_b=b_next-b, formation withdraws epsilon_b*positive(delta_b)/2 from each endpoint n and dissociation logs Q_bond=epsilon_b*positive(-delta_b); any symmetric formation limiter is predeclared and input-derived
equations.primary_response: Q is a separately frozen substrate-native downstream behavior observable from the ordinary state trajectory; crossing flux and the direct h transduction term are manipulation diagnostics and can never be the rank-4 primary response
equations.history_extension_rule: at Stage C, h may modulate a substrate-native physical rate whose purpose, ungated equation and downstream response were frozen before h; no h-specific reporter or response path may be added merely to expose h

conservation_identities.global_matter: sum_x m_x_next - sum_x m_x = 0 exactly up to the operation-derived floating-point bound
conservation_identities.regional_matter: Delta sum_Omega m = -dt * sum_boundary oriented J_m plus declared local sources minus sinks
conservation_identities.resource_and_bond_energy: Delta(sum_x n_x + epsilon_b*sum_e b_e) + dt*sum_x(D_n_local+R_native) + sum_e Q_bond_e = dt*sum_x S_n, with formation fuel withdrawn explicitly from endpoint n
conservation_identities.face_pair: the contribution of every active face to its two endpoints sums to zero for every extensive transported channel
conservation_identities.bond_energy: Delta E_bond = sum_e epsilon_b*positive(delta_b_e) - sum_e Q_bond_e; the positive term equals the two endpoint fuel withdrawals exactly
conservation_identities.controller_onset: coefficient assignment changes no state byte and has zero state-energy jump; all later flux changes remain in the face ledger

admissible_state_obligations: derive a CFL bound over a declared compact state and parameter domain proving 0 <= m_x_next <= m_max and n_x_next >= 0
if one step is not uniformly admissible, use a predeclared deterministic input-derived substep or antisymmetric face-limiter rule common to all clones
log proposed fluxes, paired limiter coefficients, residuals, bond increments, endpoint fuel withdrawals and heat
forbid negative-value clipping, output-selected tolerances and arm-specific substep counts

entity_and_tracker_contract.instantaneous_entity: a matter-rich connected component enclosed by a closed high-bond cut-set under a fixed ID-free detector; the detector is a measurement and never feeds physics
entity_and_tracker_contract.threshold_source: analytic or code-only synthetic qualification before any scientific world; never an old substrate threshold or observed yield
entity_and_tracker_contract.longitudinal_relation: retain all geometry, size, boundary and flux-compatible associations; splits and merges remain many-to-many events
entity_and_tracker_contract.intervention_support: fixed cells and physical bond faces selected at t0 from the common state; never recentered or followed

future_two_port_factorial.local_port: after Stage C introduces an ordinary experience-dependent field h distinct from structural b, q_L deletes only the pre-existing local h-to-native-rate transduction coefficient on the frozen t0 cell set; q_L never reads or gates b
future_two_port_factorial.environmental_port: q_E multiplies both orientations of one declared pre-existing resource face flux J_n on the frozen physical high-bond boundary faces; the two endpoint updates remain equal and opposite
future_two_port_factorial.environmental_claim_scope: declared boundary-resource channel only, not total environment or natural autonomy
future_two_port_factorial.primary_response_exclusion: Q must be a separately frozen downstream native behavior; the directly gated h transduction term and q_E-multiplied crossing flux are compliance diagnostics only and may not be Y
future_two_port_factorial.composition: local cell coefficient slots and environmental face mobility slots are disjoint; canonical plans and outputs must be identical under L-then-E and E-then-L compilation
future_two_port_factorial.validity_warning: rank 4 is algebraic only until state preservation, exclusion, conservation, shams and open identity validate every row

anti_manufacture_kill_switches: any bond rule references a component label, loop closure, inside/outside classification, entity target or tracker output
closed boundaries form in every law or null state so failure to form a boundary is unavailable
the environmental gate writes state, gates only one destination, leaves an unpaired face contribution or closes an arbitrary detector graph cut rather than a physical bond face
the local gate reads or gates structural b, or erases or overwrites the experience-dependent source state h
a response path or reporter is added specifically for h or b, or the directly gated transduction/crossing term is used as the primary response
open ports are not exact base dynamics
A and B supports require diagnostic matter IDs, permanent labels or adaptive tracking
boundary, controller, source, sink or reservoir work is unlogged
split, merge, leakage, dissolution, open sheets or percolation are suppressed by construction
old 03G numerical evidence or confirmation is used as new-substrate evidence
memory_free_vertical_slice: code-only scalar and vector face-flux identity with no history field
formation from state without a pre-drawn shell or component target
closed-boundary, open-sheet, no-boundary, percolation and dissolution classification
exact global and regional conservation plus raw per-face crossing ledgers
material turnover through nonzero crossings while a boundary persists
fixed-t0 A and B local reaction-edge and physical-face perturbation mechanics with exact neutral shams and order-independent composition
ID-free instantaneous detector and set-valued split/merge tracker audit

staged_program.A: boundary formation, open identity, scalar reference, positivity and CFL/admissibility proof, exact resource-bond-fuel-heat conservation, face and controller-work qualification; no scientific search
staged_program.B: fresh emergent entity formation and persistence with turnover, detector/tracker/cadence/split/merge controls; still no explicit history
staged_program.C: introduce an ordinary experience-dependent state that may modulate only a previously frozen substrate-native physical rate, add no dedicated reporter/response, requalify everything, then prospectively test history dependence and causal persistence from scratch
staged_program.D: separately seal the single-target rank-4 L by E availability factorial on declared local-transduction and boundary-resource edges
staged_program.E: only after D, seal the separate member-directed K00/K10/K01/K11 A/B individuality factorial with separate Y_A and Y_B
staged_program.F: only after E, define reproduction versus fission and test prospective inheritance; no genome is required or presumed

permitted: separate causal persistence from ownership and addressability
exact cloning, matched shams, outcome firewalls and fail-closed gates
joint but non-composite phenotype and material evidence
tracker independence, raw association edges and explicit split/merge events
fresh prospective revalidation after every architecture change
forbidden: any numerical result or effect size
any threshold, margin, time horizon or valid-world rate
Mf, its writer or its readout equations
confirmation status or evidence that the new substrate persists through turnover

next_action: human review of the Phase-0 reference architecture only
